top_signals.title: Homebuyers Hammered as War-Fueled Bond Rout Drives Up Rates
top_signals.summary: Najimah Roberson, a lifelong renter, spent the past two years searching around Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, for a home she could afford — getting outbid nearly 30 times along the way.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Euan Blair’s Multiverse ‘needs improvement’, says English education watchdog
top_signals.summary: Ofsted found the start-up was falling short in four out of the five areas assessed
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
